all.en: My college friend Daniel surprised me with two tickets to a rock concert.
all.zh: 我大學朋友丹尼爾出其不意地送了我兩張搖滾演唱會的門票。

all.en: The band was one we used to listen to constantly in our dorm room.
all.zh: 那個樂團是我們以前在宿舍裡天天聽的。

all.en: On the night of the show, we arrived at the venue two hours early.
all.zh: 演唱會當晚，我們提前兩小時抵達場地。

all.en: The line outside stretched around the entire block, full of excited fans.
all.zh: 場外的人龍繞了整個街區，全是興奮的粉絲。

all.en: We bought matching T-shirts and glow sticks from the merchandise booth.
all.zh: 我們在周邊商品攤買了一樣的T恤和螢光棒。

all.en: Once inside, we squeezed our way closer to the stage during the opening act.
all.zh: 進場後，我們趁著暖場樂團表演時，往舞台前擠近一些。

all.en: When the main band finally appeared, the entire crowd erupted into cheers.
all.zh: 當主秀樂團終於登場時，全場觀眾發出震天的歡呼聲。

all.en: Daniel and I screamed every lyric until our voices grew hoarse.
all.zh: 我和丹尼爾大聲唱著每一句歌詞，直到喉嚨都嘶啞了。

all.en: The lights, the bass, and the energy of the fans were unforgettable.
all.zh: 燈光、低音與粉絲的熱情，都讓人難以忘懷。

all.en: During the encore, the singer thanked everyone for sticking with the band.
all.zh: 安可時，主唱感謝大家一路以來對樂團的支持。

all.en: On the train home, we agreed it was the best night of the year.
all.zh: 在回家的火車上，我們一致認為這是今年最棒的一晚。

all.en: The following morning, both of us woke up with terribly sore throats.
all.zh: 隔天早上，我們兩個都帶著嚴重沙啞的喉嚨醒來。

all.en: Daniel sent me a video he had secretly recorded during the encore song.
all.zh: 丹尼爾傳給我一段他在安可曲時偷偷錄下的影片。

all.en: Watching it again, I could hardly believe how loud the crowd had been.
all.zh: 再次觀看時，我幾乎無法相信當時觀眾有多麼震耳欲聾。

all.en: We posted a few photos online and instantly received many jealous comments.
all.zh: 我們上傳了幾張照片，馬上收到許多羨慕的留言。

all.en: My boss noticed my hoarse voice and laughed when I explained the reason.
all.zh: 我的主管注意到我嘶啞的嗓音，聽完原因後笑了出來。

all.en: Daniel suggested we start saving money for the band's tour next summer.
all.zh: 丹尼爾提議我們開始存錢，為了樂團明年夏天的巡迴演出。

all.en: He even printed out a calendar to track every announced concert date.
all.zh: 他甚至印了一份月曆，用來追蹤每一個公布的演唱會日期。

all.en: I framed the concert ticket and hung it above my desk at the office.
all.zh: 我把演唱會門票裱框，掛在辦公室的桌子上方。

all.en: My coworkers asked about it whenever they walked past my small cubicle.
all.zh: 每當同事經過我的小隔間，他們都會問起這張票。

all.en: That single night had clearly turned both of us into superfans once more.
all.zh: 那一夜顯然讓我們兩個再次變回了超級粉絲。

all.en: Two months later, the band announced a brand new album release party.
all.zh: 兩個月後，那個樂團宣布了一場全新專輯的發行派對。

all.en: Daniel ordered the limited vinyl edition the very second tickets went online.
all.zh: 丹尼爾在門票一開放時，就立刻訂下了限量黑膠唱片版。

all.en: We listened to the album together on his old record player that Saturday.
all.zh: 那個週六，我們在他的老式唱機上一起聽完整張專輯。

all.en: The sound felt warmer and richer than any streaming service could provide.
all.zh: 那個聲音比任何串流平台都來得溫暖、飽滿。

all.en: He insisted we recreate our concert outfits, even down to the glow sticks.
all.zh: 他堅持我們要重現演唱會當天的造型，連螢光棒都不能少。

all.en: My neighbors must have wondered why so much music kept escaping our walls.
all.zh: 鄰居們大概在納悶，為何牆裡會不斷傳出這麼多音樂聲。

all.en: We discovered three new favorite songs during our second careful listen.
all.zh: 我們在第二次仔細聆聽時，發現了三首新的最愛歌曲。

all.en: Daniel started learning the bass line of the lead single by ear.
all.zh: 丹尼爾開始用耳朵聽，學習主打歌的貝斯旋律。

all.en: I began writing down lyrics that felt meaningful in my private journal.
all.zh: 我開始把覺得有意義的歌詞，抄寫在我的私人日記裡。

all.en: Music, we agreed, was clearly the longest thread of our friendship together.
all.zh: 我們一致認為，音樂顯然是我們友誼中最長的一條線。

all.en: The following summer, Daniel and I finally embarked on the band's tour journey.
all.zh: 隔年夏天，我和丹尼爾終於踏上了追隨樂團巡迴的旅程。

all.en: We attended three concerts in three different cities across the entire island.
all.zh: 我們在全島三個不同的城市，連續參加了三場演唱會。

all.en: Each venue offered a slightly different atmosphere and equally passionate crowds.
all.zh: 每個場地都有著稍微不同的氛圍，但觀眾的熱情同樣高漲。

all.en: Daniel had perfected the bass line and played it on his apartment guitar nightly.
all.zh: 丹尼爾已經練熟了貝斯旋律，每晚在公寓裡用吉他彈奏。

all.en: At the Taichung show, we somehow ended up dancing right next to the stage.
all.zh: 在台中那場，我們不知怎麼地竟然跳舞跳到了舞台正前方。

all.en: A roadie noticed our shirts and tossed us two real signed drumsticks.
all.zh: 一位舞台人員注意到我們的T恤，扔給我們兩支真正有簽名的鼓棒。

all.en: Daniel framed his drumstick next to the original concert ticket the very next week.
all.zh: 丹尼爾下週就把他的鼓棒裱框，放在最初那張演唱會門票旁邊。

all.en: I kept mine in a small velvet box on my private bedroom shelf.
all.zh: 我則把我的鼓棒放在一個絨布小盒裡，擺在臥室的私人書架上。

all.en: We promised each other we would attend every Taiwanese tour for the rest of our lives.
all.zh: 我們約定彼此，這輩子每一次的台灣巡演都要一起參加。

all.en: That summer, music had become the unshakeable backbone of our adult friendship.
all.zh: 那個夏天，音樂成為了我們成年友誼裡，最堅實的支柱。
